cause_analysis.narrative: Face Grace Esthetics churned on 2026-03-23 after 391 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 25-day silence starting 2026-02-06. Classification: reactive fade — Zoca reached out 26 times, but the client only replied 0. A one-sided monologue in the weeks before churn.
recommendations: [Engagement] One-way outreach is a warning, not a save. Cap outreach at 5 attempts if no reply, then switch to a different channel or a different messenger (SP → AM → team lead) to break the pattern.
